# Copilot Instructions

<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This is an Angular TypeScript project. When generating code:

- Follow Angular best practices and conventions
- Use TypeScript with proper typing
- Follow Angular style guide recommendations
- Use Angular CLI patterns for component, service, and module generation
- Implement proper dependency injection
- Use Angular reactive forms when dealing with forms
- Follow Angular lifecycle hooks appropriately
- Use proper Angular testing patterns with Jasmine and Karma
